154.content: Since Dil is only three months old, do Stu and Didi try to potty-train him early, or do they wait until he turns two or three?
154.title: Dil Pickles

1541.content: Since they kept failing to potty train Tommy, they decided that maybe Dil should be potty trained instead of Tommy. So that's just what they did once Dil was up from his nap Didi got him to use the potty while Stu got the potty ready for Dil to use it. When all of a sudden Tommy wakes up from his own nap and asks why is the potty chair out. It's because we're going to potty train Dil. Upon hearing this does Tommy change his mind about never wanting to stop wearing and using diapers?
1541.title: Stu and Didi try to Potty-train Him Early

1542.content: What story will we go with?
1542.title: Wait Until He's Two

choices: He Liked That He Still Wore Diapers
He Wished He Was Potty-Trained Like His Friends
15421.content:
Dil Pickles had recently celebrated his second birthday. He could now walk all by himself, and he had grown a full head of red hair. Now that he could walk by himself, he was a very hyperactive young toddler. However, because he was the youngest in his group, he was the only one who still wore diapers. His older brother, Tommy, was now three years old, and so were Phil and Lil, the DeVille twins. Chuckie Finster was now four, and his younger sister, Kimi, was three and a half. Angelica, his older cousin, was now five.

How did Dil feel knowing that he was the only one in his group who still wore diapers?
15421.title: Story 1

choices: He Found Them Soft and Comfortable
He Could Go Potty Wherever and Whenever He Wanted
154211.content: Dil liked that he still wore diapers. Why was it?
154211.title: He Liked That He Still Wore Diapers

info.brief_description: Follow the babies from Rugrats in their adventures in potty training!
info.description:
A previously deleted interactive story brought back for fans of Rugrats. Join the babies in their adventures in potty-training.

Rules:

1. Keep each chapter clean.
2. Diaper changes are allowed.
3. No weight gain.
4. Pooping in the diaper or training toilet is one of the main focuses.
5. Have fun!
